comment.body: One small anecdote to know the market is near a peak and euphoric: my sister reached out to me asking if she should invest in Nvidia two days ago. She knows close to nothing about investing, stocks, and the financial markets.  I have had like 2 conversations with her my whole life about stocks and investing. lol.  Clear indicator to me to start scaling out of some high performing stocks.

comment.body:
Mind games. Reputation loss if they use the 2B building spend as corruption charges or wasteful charges etc. to see if they can make Powell resign on his own. They can also nominate a shadow chair and make Powell's commentary worthless. Also his window is shrinking since Powell's term ends only August of next year which does not leave enough time for November midterms. He needs the juice via rate cuts to prop up this economy which is very weak underneath the hood. All the jobs being added are hospitality etc. and there is a white collar bloodbath thanks to AI and other disruptions. 

So Trump needs his fed chair now to provide the juice.
